description: Baseline research scaffold with empty primary-source inventory for pi-mono versus OMP comparison.
Added a validated primary-source inventory covering pi-mono, OMP, and key plugins (multi-pass, design-deck, autoresearch) plus compatibility signals.
Expanded the evidence set with raw plugin source files and issue API entries to verify namespace coupling, plugin expectations, and recent extension-related fixes.
Extended the evidence inventory with GSD-2 sources to evaluate whether its workflow engine can be embedded in OMP versus run side-by-side or bridged through MCP/headless modes.
